verdicts.reason: shows generic chocolate-chip cookies; Afghan biscuits are cocoa+cornflake brown biscuits, often iced — primary ingredient mismatch
roasted aubergine halves on a tray — correct dish
cauliflower with paprika dusting dominant on the plate
shows mixed cauliflower florets in a vegetable medley, not the thick sliced "steaks" the recipe is about
raw chicken thighs on a chopping board, not a cooked finished dish
golden chips/fries with ketchup on parchment — correct dish
whole raw courgettes being held in hands; recipe is breaded/fried courgette fries — ingredient shot, wrong format
bowl of falafel balls with yoghurt sauce — correct dish
cooked fish fillets styled on a wooden board — close enough
golden fries with ketchup — correct dish
image is a hot-air balloon labelled "Halei" — completely off-topic, no food visible
loaded jacket potato with cheese, sour cream, chives — correct dish
sliced cooked pork belly with crispy edges on a plate — correct dish
BBQ-glazed ribs on a grill — recipe is chunked Asian-flavoured pork belly bites, wrong format and cuisine
roasted root veg with carrots as the dominant element — close enough
golden roast potatoes with peas in background — correct dish
raw salmon fillets on parchment with raw veg — ingredient shot, not a cooked dish
block of plain uncooked tofu on a plate; recipe is air-fried tofu with soy/sesame glaze — ingredient shot, wrong format
Italian spaghetti and meatballs in a green bowl; albondigas en salsa is Spanish meatballs in tomato sauce, no pasta — wrong cuisine and format
spoons and jars of nut butter spreads; recipe is set fudge — wrong dish entirely
pineapple-based blended drink in a glass with pineapple wedge — correct drink family
pile of whole fresh strawberries; ambrosia salad is a creamy fruit-and-marshmallow salad — raw ingredient, not prepared dish
beef stew with carrots, potatoes and bread — correct dish
bowl of granola/muesli topped with banana slices; recipe is creamy porridge with apple — wrong format and wrong topping fruit
pile of whole green apples; chutney is a cooked jammy preserve, typically in jars — ingredient shot, not finished dish
oat bowl with diced apple, almond butter and cinnamon dust — correct dish
apple crumble pie with apples and brown sugar nearby — correct dish
baked apple pie on cooling rack with apples and rolling pin — close enough (lattice vs solid top is acceptable variation)
red/pink smoothie with raspberries and apples — correct drink
pile of sugared triangular hand-pies, consistent with turnovers — correct format
multi-plate restaurant tasting shot; the parmigiana stack is tiny in the background and poached eggs dominate the foreground — wrong format
clear chicken broth with diced carrots and egg noodles; avgolemono is a creamy egg-and-lemon thickened Greek soup — wrong texture and style
salad with grilled chicken on top, mixed vegetables and greens — correct dish family
mashed aubergine dip with pomegranate seeds — correct dish, acceptable variant
a plate of pasta with arugula and sausage; recipe is pan-fried squash fritters — wrong dish entirely
baked chicken pieces on a tray with caramelised brown glaze — close enough to baked chicken family
choux pastry puffs / profiteroles on a tray; recipe is baked croissants which should be crescent-shaped laminated dough — wrong pastry type
meatballs in tomato sauce in a small pan with bread — correct dish
round cheesecake topped with fresh raspberries — correct dish
two plain butter biscuits in a small dish on a blue background; recipe is baked vanilla cheesecake — completely wrong dish

slice of banana bread loaf with banana chips and icing; recipe is overnight oats in a bowl — wrong format
dried/dehydrated banana slices laid out — consistent with banana crisps

pork sausages cooking in a pan with no mash visible; recipe is bangers AND mash — missing the mashed-potato component that defines the dish
close-up of raw raisins/sultanas; bara brith is a baked Welsh fruit loaf — ingredient shot, not finished dish
